In [60]:
from prophet import Prophet
In [61]:
def sales_pred(Store_ID, sales, periods):
    sales = sales[ sales['Store'] == Store_ID ]
    sales = sales[['Date', 'Sales']].rename(columns = {'Date': 'ds', 'Sales':'y'})
    sales = sales.sort_values('ds')
    model = Prophet()
    model.fit(sales)
    future = model.make_future_dataframe(periods=periods)
    forecast = model.predict(future)
    figure = model.plot(forecast, xlabel='Date', ylabel='Sales')
    figure2  = model.plot_components(forecast)
In [ ]:
sales_pred(10,all_sales,60)
In [68]:
def sales_pred2(Store_ID, sales, holidays, periods):
    sales = sales[ sales['Store'] == Store_ID ]
    sales = sales[['Date', 'Sales']].rename(columns = {'Date': 'ds', 'Sales':'y'})
    sales = sales.sort_values('ds')
  
    model    = Prophet(holidays = holidays)
    model.fit(sales)
    future   = model.make_future_dataframe(periods = periods)
    forecast = model.predict(future)
    figure   = model.plot(forecast, xlabel='Date', ylabel='Sales')
    figure2  = model.plot_components(forecast)
